data.title: Live coverage: SpaceX to launch 24 Starlink satellites on Falcon 9 rocket from Vandenberg SFB
data.desc: The Starlink 17-36 mission will be SpaceX’s 51st Falcon 9 launch of 2026. Liftoff from pad 4E is scheduled for 7:37 pm PDT (10:37 pm EDT / 0237 UTC).

data.title: Falcon Heavy Returns with ViaSat-3 F3
data.desc: SpaceX’s Falcon Heavy rocket made a rare appearance on April 29th, launching the ViaSat-3 F3 spacecraft after an eighteen-month gap in its manifest.

data.title: SpaceX launches 6-ton ViaSat-3 F3 satellite on Falcon Heavy rocket
data.desc: The mission was the 12th launch of a Falcon Heavy rocket to date. The rocket lifted off from pad 39A at NASA’s Kennedy Space Center at 10:13 a.m. EDT
